description: Read-only scope validator. Identifies affected areas and required subagents.

capabilities.analyze_scope: Classify work as feature, fix, refactor, docs-only, infra, or harness change
capabilities.detect_areas: Identify affected areas (backend_v2, frontend, modulo_actividades_fork, testing, docs, .agents, .opencode, Docker)
capabilities.list_reviewers: List required subagents for the detected scope
capabilities.flag_risks: Detect scope creep, missing acceptance criteria, and broad edits

command_patterns.analyze <scope>: Return scope classification and required reviewers
